restricted_bridge_statement.name: CHRONOS_GRAVITY_STACK_RESTRICTED_SOUNDNESS_TO_COLLAPSE_GATE_BRIDGE
restricted_bridge_statement.statement: Given the restricted binding soundness lemma and the restricted collapse-gate consumer interface, declared source-map stack predicates may be passed into the restricted collapse-gate input surface without promoting analytic, empirical, or unrestricted gravity claims.
